name: The White House
subject: 26 years later
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=353bcd5a57f4c0acec61174eec1b33481a1f1d5c1088ceec205e79f96cff6f1bb3f24261e8a775c8183194472d0130067046fb97f0eb0b43

26 years later, a president hears rural America

On January 13, 1992, President George H. W. Bush spoke at the American Farm Bureau Federation’s annual convention in Kansas City, Missouri. Fresh off a 12-day trip to Asia, he talked about trade, security, and prosperity for rural America in the new global economy.

For more than a quarter-century, no American president returned to speak at the convention, which is a staple of the U.S. agriculture industry. Yesterday, President Donald J. Trump broke that trend.

Here is what he told the convention:

- “We have been working every day to deliver for America’s farmers just as they work every day to deliver for us.”
- Tax reform means that “American farmers will be able to deduct 100% of the cost of new equipment in the year you make the investment.”
- “We are reviewing all of our trade agreements to make sure they are fair and reciprocal.”

The President signed two orders moments after he spoke, both of which act on the recommendation of his Agriculture and Rural Prosperity Task Force to expand access to broadband internet in rural America.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=353bcd5a57f4c0acbe2d27015a0448556e63156c4de57423a822ef048a040238fc82284446645a192579b7b0ccea86280634343510476e71
Read: “Our farmers deserve a government that serves their interest.”

The power of conservative voices

“I think from the conservative perspective, we accomplished more thanks to President Trump’s leadership than has been accomplished in more than a generation,” Vice President Mike Pence told Dana Loesch in an interview yesterday.

The Vice President covered a lot of ground with the conservative radio and television host. The two discussed the economy, infrastructure, North Korea, and what to expect from Republicans in 2018. Loesch also asked Vice President Pence about the state of political commentary during the Trump Administration.

“The reality is that great, strong . . . [conservative voices] have, while outnumbered, served to create a tremendous counterweight,” the Vice President said.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=353bcd5a57f4c0ac72090600993d94db6248b5d5b5a9324b9e7e8849bffea807f484d1524afb069403aa1fa0b44cce3e55f4c7561799539e
Read the full conversation here.

Tax reform: Where are we going?

Council of Economic Advisers Chairman Kevin Hassett shares a simple message on tax reform: Wage growth in America has been much too slow for too long, but business tax reform offers a glimmer of hope.

Here is Dr. Hassett’s breakdown:

- “Wage growth has been stagnant for much of the past two decades.”
- “With the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act now enacted, America’s corporate tax position stands to encourage rather than discourage investment and therefore wage growth.”
- What’s next? “The corporate income tax base stands to increase, allowing America’s tax rate to fall while revenues remain unchanged.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=353bcd5a57f4c0ac76fc3c722e4dbdceff17187510a56e3a07a4550d7a08df19a7179e54304f6ba8fc983c89da3d84db655101b32ce30ca9
Read: On tax reform, where have we been and where are we going?

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump participates in on field ceremonies at the 2018 College Football Playoff National Championship between the University of Alabama Crimson Tide and the University of Georgia Bulldogs | January 8, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

This morning, President Trump will host a meeting with bipartisan members of the Senate about immigration. In the afternoon, the President will sign an Executive Order on “Supporting our Veterans during their Transition from Uniformed Service to Civilian Life.”

Later, the President will meet with Secretary of Defense James Mattis.

Vice President Mike Pence will travel to the U.S. Capitol to participate in the Senate Republican Policy Lunch.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=353bcd5a57f4c0ac72a9e6e8129348c27d6ae68a1d24bfc0ca4bf77cf019c99740cd1909dbe05c3718b4bfe875751b0e5fc12c6df0d59a94
Privacy Policy |

Contact the White House |

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Immigration Survey: PENDING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
What are the terms of our proposal? |
---
| | | | | | | | [ ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9078c83068eb1b0fe8c3b0aa2a23af173bdb7ac5c1b1feeaabd3ddbf72217a1802ca2bd009d9a6f345c6cfe8350b34e6bb48781d6e387bc6)
---

Friend,

For years, politicians have talked about "compassionate" immigration reform, but every one of their proposals showed ZERO compassion for American workers, the victims of crimes committed by illegal immigrants, and for the safety and security of our nation.

It's time for responsible immigration reform that actually shows **love for AMERICAN CITIZENS.**

Before I bring a proposal to the table, I want to have the full force of the American people united behind a plan that we want. I want to hear your immigration demands,
Friend.

**[Please take my Responsible Immigration Survey by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9078c83068eb1b0f11ac3c78be3caf889ed68454e5aa13ceb2e8459565c782d250d0ea4ddf4c8382c52f234c0a31399b2882d2c67bd611a7)**

Chuck and Nancy -- and EVERY liberal obstructionist -- need to understand that it's not just me that wants these critical proposals turned into law...

...These are the demands of the American PEOPLE. Your elected officials need to know just how many voters will be furious if our demands are not met.

_And I want to be able to give an exact number of how many people back each proposal. This is the Art of the Deal!_

**[So please, take my Responsible Immigration Survey by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=9078c83068eb1b0feb72c86dac667c3b4d38a6d61e041446e1b40452f92a623b85782a42b54760f4ff9a94cc67148f84d7de11ff06c9eec4)**

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

body:

---
| | | **Governor Holcomb Delivers his State of the State Address Tonight!**
---
|
---
| **_Tune in tonight!_ **Watch Governor Eric Holcomb give his second State of the State address **tonight at 7 p.m. **You can watch the address live on your favorite local Indiana TV affilliate, or [stream the speech live online](https://facebook.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80a71c2714359455775d068a2&id=fb590b0c93&e=716de7d363).

You won't want to miss Governor Holcomb highlight **Indiana's incredible momentum** and his **priorities for his second year in office.**

---
|
---

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Tell Trump: NO offshore drilling in FL
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| **"Trump proposes massive expansion of offshore drilling"**
\-- _The Hill_ , 1/4/2018 The Trump administration wants to sell the health and safety of our coastlines to the highest bidder. In Florida, we oppose offshore drilling because so many communities, small businesses, and indeed our entire economy rely on our coastlines. Expanding offshore drilling is an environmental disaster waiting to happen. [_**I am 1,000% opposed to drilling off the shores of Florida. Let President Trump know you are, as well. Add your name >>**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fa4/622b7b5b/18bfcdbe/307bbb3f/3710245767/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180110") Eight years ago, we saw the destruction offshore oil drilling can cause. The Deepwater Horizon disaster destroyed coastal areas along the Florida panhandle. Coastal communities (and their tourism economy) were hit hard, not to mention the damage to marine life and ecosystems throughout the Gulf Coast. I want to be clear: **This move by Trump is a giveaway to his friends in Big Oil and Gas.** Historically, the Florida congressional delegation has been in lock-step against expanded drilling, regardless of party. Just last year, I authored a plan with a Republican colleague to extend the ban on offshore drilling in our waters. This isn't a partisan issue in Florida. All you need to do is talk to one Florida family that enjoys our beaches, one small business owner whose livelihood depends on tourism, or one marine biologist to realize why more drilling isn't worth the risk. [_**Let's oppose Trump's newest destructive plan not just with words, but with grassroots action. Sign the petition to oppose offshore drilling.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fa4/622b7b5b/18bfcdbe/307bbb3f/3710245767/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180110") Thank you. Debbie |

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7b792a182f4b4e0a87d24d3948392f50&_e=K3o4OwG0FZQRtG0-2S3Ody2cD8T3xZQDGl5veO0fbJyyOQeqgctlo0MMGSgUfmXl3PQqzowGAHmLnpAMd8enu3eFB58iLWbtGnWJhYvAmOrTYEyvN3dStYq1glUERM9Q2x-vGfelwJGzr4PXcEpVithnFSrjOmg04yz34eUIGLOLPfXLYG1gk_aDYkkiKk-qxHkGZVcxVxyD1p4lZWI25s98XuqqvyJEnXLIBq4U9KXIUA6gqlwSErB7D5S6DmkB4GcrkACvGoLbwMPfre3CN_RTilIs3YoANDbAyMjWXu2Os2H7i_TFK9FcXhzEAo0PGjMSmPo_iGAZ3J5SwXHoRMTfpHAIRBHdDrbRkbUzYRAaa0yCc-LLUKMHtVpYGe8Q) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7b792a182f4b4e0a87d24d3948392f50&_e=K3o4OwG0FZQRtG0-2S3Ody2cD8T3xZQDGl5veO0fbJy3-ClsoRdBdzfNq-d9wuN4klSmisYTs1aCHIk7hf0ziENUifTAqGHQPFCVg7odeUbWwW8y3juPiAn0Ec-NSbFCXiSbMy0mGNgeif0BvpgdlgcNkeaM8FlsRs4FsI-_N8B9S9KCc4_KDtkcucBK8EJO7WhIQ0SDerM04yOn25s0t14JFA5Z7N7x_zsO4CsqeyFHYeYsQIVx4s5CQkWNJHF8UL8V6LWvt-6d9r7vRE_NDy2InG77s-p83KJHO5ATNih9kt_1bTGnhQlpgXll0XUt3ZCN9dlQX5hqpE9w2vfnsH0IqhvSY3q350ypfxUFKepDnAIAmk9ICyPwPh5ijV3K) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7b792a182f4b4e0a87d24d3948392f50&_e=K3o4OwG0FZQRtG0-2S3OdwhDM0MGs0E_YDSZXgBq4bJSba-0Fvzd7o2jr00xvRvVC5E2kU3XKykRqsKfsUL1GqpYU8D6TT6HD9HB0KXvcftS3FxBzE20UkDPp7VyvEeJ-eew6BnTG2SfmA59QHCDx0YPhcA4BHH9I5soWSDovk0zsWzDNp7C-pt9DTBq33j4qw8rne5yn4CKcQKzlRM5gX6_USQFP6YQXeJ-9F5Vr1Cx6Wvo-yKym3nOXL6o1UrOXpqqiX79Burj6D_QqLORVg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7b792a182f4b4e0a87d24d3948392f50&_e=K3o4OwG0FZQRtG0-2S3OdwyDg9Jyr_e1Gvu_FSpkd0aDndcXDTB9YFvtCDEEKk4gR1lcSDj39UjeGlVON0Ic9ZeJQa9ldEqRyF5NFUdwIs6bQHwXuxReMpwNv9XbFMXYRhIX7HnK4wyxAdRaMh7Qydrm35c2vmMXFYdQOxiUpTnTH4OzqDyUx1bNDWLcPKrkUkhE_cR21BURCV308qWS2YEDNPhYejUjPBaMo413sdrHxa3L4HIMylHxeW4zlzjvEkAacjvn3tytrBBQVpL-0w%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=7b792a182f4b4e0a87d24d3948392f50&_e=K3o4OwG0FZQRtG0-2S3Od-oRmNRKl2fniHlpSyikwtb5tmLAhDFXj-zB4Gs-TSet1nPDyZ0oNgLiWDfABa21rbouBRDslc5ACtmqYEqkTlWk4eBbMTNc_RL_TjkgkkIVG_-1eklyn5QFbymjwcRYGE5bbI45cRczaL2bRBwUIQU6ybNN7EyaHi4ZzZNWhIQpUT7IYVbajymNMVR5gDWLw6OO7lj-m92g8HT5kfpxXPrLovOb7iugo4XAZ4wtu7mTBAa5FGIOVut7O7eRgoS5gA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. name: Andrew Gillum
subject: re: State of the State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3213/9e00690/40dc035b/2403f8df/154257673/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em17_180109_SoS_fnd_gq_act__AG&source=em17_180109_SoS_fnd_gq_act__AG")
Hello --

Later today, Governor Rick Scott will give his last State of the State address as he gets ready to run for Senate with Donald Trump's endorsement. He'll tout his so-called accomplishments, especially on our economy. And honestly, I wish I lived in the picture-perfect state Governor Scott will describe, but sadly I don't.

Florida has one of the highest levels of income inequality in the country with the top 1% receiving over 30 times more than the bottom 99%. Nearly half our state's households struggle to make ends meet.

How can Governor Scott declare his time in office a resounding success?

Donald Trump may love Rick Scott and want him in the United States Senate, but that doesn't change the facts: working people have suffered under Rick Scott. Thanks to him and the other Republican governors over the last 20 years, Florida's economy hasn't grown for working people. And I, along with thousands of other Floridians, think it's time to change that.

**[In 2018 we have the chance to elect a new leader to the Governor's Mansion who will work for all people, but I can't do it alone -- so chip in $5 now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3213/9e00690/40dc035b/2403f8de/154257673/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018?utm_campaign=em17_180109_SoS_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_180109_SoS_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_content=2+-+In+2018+we+have+the+chance+to+elect+a+ne")**

We must create an economy with good-paying jobs that works for all Floridians, instead of just those at the top like Rick Scott and Donald Trump. I'm more than ready to bring fresh ideas to utilize all the assets of our state, including our best asset -- our people -- to build a better economy in Florida.

**[So chip in $5 now and let's start rebuilding Florida, together.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3213/9e00690/40dc035b/2403f8d1/154257673/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018?utm_campaign=em17_180109_SoS_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_180109_SoS_fnd_gq_act__AG&utm_content=3+-+So+chip+in++ask++now+and+lets+start+rebu")**

Thank you,

Andrew

Earlier today, Joe Arpaio announced that he is running for Senate in Arizona.

You may remember Joe Arpaio for his human rights abuses as a sheriff in Arizona. Or perhaps you remember him from when he was convicted of a criminal offense related to his long history of racially profiling Latinos. Or you might remember when his friend Donald Trump pardoned him for his crime.

subject: another one of those emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
We know we send you a lot of fundraising emails. It's not because we think we're great writers. |
---

| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2278/7377f838/32a55e8e/51fa1109/261357020/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-2018kickoff?refcode=20180109ndvB&amount=10")
---
Peter,

We know we send you a lot of fundraising emails. It's not because we think we're great writers.

We do it because **Joe 's race is consistently listed as one of the top 5 Senate races in the country -- in fact, _Politico_ just ranked Indiana's seat the 3rd most likely to flip parties**. Rankings like that will encourage dark money groups to get involved. So we'll need the funds to run a top-notch campaign, one with experienced staff, impactful advertising, and a robust field program to reach folks across the state.

Thanks to you, we've had a good start. _But we can 't afford to let up now_. Now that we're into 2018, special interests will start their campaigns against Joe in earnest. And they're going to start spending now.

That's why we're asking you to step up today: **Will you pitch in to our $10,000 2018 Kickoff Fund?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Here's why we're asking you to contribute today:
* **WHY NOW:** With less than 10 months to go before Election Day, we need to build the most robust campaign possible to defend against the coming attacks.
* **WHAT YOUR DONATION WILL DO:** Give us the ability to open campaign offices across the state so we can share Joe's message with voters in swing communities.

name: Geri Prado, EMILY's List
subject: Our first election day of 2018 is 1 week away!
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6a4e/24c69fd9/13b359d06/1892c134/2443859778/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEM12N_digital_email_20180109_OurFirstElectionDay_inact&source=WQEFEM12N_digital_email_20180109_OurFirstElectionDay_inact")
---

Peter,

Our first election day of 2018 is just a week away!

Right now, we are focused on a competitive special election in Wisconsin featuring Patty Schachtner who is running to flip a state Senate seat blue.

Let's start the year off right by replacing a Republican with a pro-choice Democratic woman next week.

**[Donate $3 to help Patty and all our women running in 2018 rack up the wins.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6a4e/24c69fd9/13b359d06/1892c135/2443859778/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180109_email_OurFirstElectionDay?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+Patty+and+all+our+women&utm_campaign=WQEFEM12N_digital_email_20180109_OurFirstElectionDay_inact&source=WQEFEM12N_digital_email_20180109_OurFirstElectionDay_inact")**

Patty is a school board member and medical examiner running for Wisconsin Senate District 10. She serves on the board of directors of Turning Point Wisconsin, a center that helps survivors of sexual assault and domestic violence.

She's exactly the type of person we need standing up to Republicans in the Wisconsin state Senate -- which we put "On Notice" last year because of all the anti-choice legislation coming out of the GOP-controlled chamber.

Patty could be the first in a wave that turns the Wisconsin state Senate and the other nine legislative chambers we put On Notice blue.

We had 42 state and local wins last year. I'm ready to start putting wins in our column this year -- are you?

**Donate $3 to help send Patty to the Wisconsin state Senate on January 16th and start a wave of pro-choice Democratic women replacing anti-choice Republicans at the state level this year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Win-First-2018-Election-Day](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6a4e/24c69fd9/13b359d06/1892c136/2443859778/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180109_email_OurFirstElectionDay?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgWinFirst2018Elec&utm_campaign=WQEFEM12N_digital_email_20180109_OurFirstElectionDay_inact&source=WQEFEM12N_digital_email_20180109_OurFirstElectionDay_inact")**

Thanks,

Geri Prado
Senior Director of State & Local Campaigns, EMILY's List
